sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince geometric optimal portfolio allocation. Allocate weights X1...Xn across n≥4 market systems via constrained optimization solving covariance-weighted system. Optimal f = 0.1688965 maximizes geometric mean return E while minimizing portfolio variance V via Lagrangian constraints.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio weights across multiple market systems to achieve the geometric optimal portfolio that maximizes the geometric mean return while respecting covariance constraints.
